_comment: Furigana/ruby layout settings. Resource packs can override this file at assets/rubi/ruby_settings.json to tweak how ruby annotations are laid out. Values reload when resource packs change.
_fields: text_scale = base text scale inside ruby annotations (1.0 = no shift), ruby_scale = furigana scale relative to base, ruby_overlap = furigana overlap with base (positive = closer/overlaps, negative = gap above base), y_offset_furigana = extra vertical shift (in pixels) applied to lines that render at least one unknown ruby word (positive = down), y_offset_plain = extra vertical shift applied to lines that render no furigana at all (no annotations, or all known), line_height_bonus = integer pixels added to Font.lineHeight globally so wrapped paragraphs leave room for furigana above each line (positive = more space between lines). Legacy key "y_offset" is still accepted and seeds y_offset_furigana for backward compatibility.
